reference: I got married four months ago. My periods became regular after marriage, but this month I had severe pain during the first day, and the blood was quite brown in color and changed gradually. However, my period lasted just for two days. I do not know why. My husband and I are having regular sexual intercourse. How can I get pregnant, and could these be symptoms of pregnancy? Otherwise, how can I find out?
text: I got married four months ago. My periods became regular after marriage, but this month I had severe pain during the first day, and the blood was quite brown in color and changed gradually. However, my period lasted just for two days. I do not know why. My and I are having regular sexual intercourse. How can I get pregnant? And could these be symptoms of pregnancy?
